methodology: Static review of YAML + embedded Python; AlphaLoader loose/strict load; codebase tracing of UniverseSynchronizer → CrossSectionalContext → CompositionEngine; pytest subset (598 tests in alpha + selected integration + reference load). No walk-forward PnL or live-slippage evidence audited.

inventory_columns.note: Mechanism family omitted for PORTFOLIO rows (multiple consumes); regime_gate N/A for PORTFOLIO.

alphas.regime_gate: hmm_3state_fractional; on P(normal)>0.7 and abs(spread_z_30d)<0.5; off P(normal)<0.5 or spread_z_30d>1.5

findings.finding: Declared trend_mechanism.family is KYLE_INFO but hypothesis emphasizes VWAP/TWAP parent-order slicing — structurally closer to scheduled/batch liquidity provision than Kyle λ permanent-impact narrative. Fingerprint passes G16 via micro_price only; kyle_lambda_60s is not in l1_signature_sensors.
findings.recommended_action: Either retag mechanism family / rewrite hypothesis for coherence, or add kyle_lambda_60s to sensors + signal logic if the economic claim is Kyle-style impact.

findings.finding: No per-alpha promotion.gate_thresholds; falsification criteria reference forward correlations and DSR — testable but not wired to CI artifacts in this audit.
findings.recommended_action: Attach measurable promotion evidence gates when promoting beyond research.

findings.finding: Loads under AlphaLoader with enforce_trend_mechanism true and false.

alphas.regime_gate: on P(normal)>0.6 and spread_z_30d<=1.0; off P(normal)<0.4 or spread_z_30d>2.0

findings.finding: Hypothesis and YAML cite forward 300s return correlations for falsification — descriptive only; signal code uses snapshot/regime only (no lookahead in evaluate).
findings.recommended_action: Keep falsification as research metrics; ensure research notebooks never leak forward returns into features.

findings.finding: margin_ratio equals platform minimum 1.5 (Inv-12 floor); minimal shock buffer.
findings.recommended_action: Stress-test at 2× cost; consider raising disclosed edge or costs to reflect uncertainty.

findings.finding: Falsification text cites half-life envelope [1,60]s; platform G16 INVENTORY envelope is [5,60]s per layer_validator — documentation drift.
findings.recommended_action: Align YAML falsification band with enforced G16 table.

findings.finding: Used as feeder for PORTFOLIO alphas at horizon 300s; UniverseSynchronizer only attaches signals where Signal.horizon_seconds equals CrossSectionalContext.horizon_seconds — this alpha never surfaces inside 300s contexts (see PORTFOLIO findings).
findings.recommended_action: Align horizons or redesign synchronizer fan-in (portfolio-level change).

findings.finding: Same cross-horizon issue as inventory when used as feeder for pofi_xsect_mixed_mechanism_v1 (portfolio horizon 300s).
findings.evidence: depends_on_signals in mixed portfolio alpha + synchronizer

findings.finding: hazard_exit.enabled true — wired for Phase 4.1 hazard path per platform skill docs.

alphas.regime_gate: on scheduled_flow_window_active==1 and seconds_to_window_close>60; off window inactive or seconds_to_window_close<30

findings.finding: Trade relies on scheduled_flow_window_direction_prior and calendar-backed sensor; economically valid only if prior is knowable at boundary timestamp (exchange-published / deterministic calendar). Audit did not re-verify sensor implementation against live feed latency.
findings.recommended_action: Document feed latency + staleness in sensor spec; add functional tests under pytest -m functional if available.

findings.finding: depends_on_signals lists pofi_inventory_revert_v1 (horizon_seconds=30) but PORTFOLIO horizon_seconds=300. UniverseSynchronizer publishes CrossSectionalContext only at PORTFOLIO horizons and selects Signal events with matching sig.horizon_seconds — inventory feeder signals are excluded from ctx.signals_by_symbol at 300s barriers.
findings.recommended_action: Set feeder SIGNAL horizons to 300, add multi-horizon synchronizer fan-in, or drop misleading depends_on_signals entry.

findings.finding: max_gross_exposure_pct=50 and capital_allocation_pct=100 are aggressive for deploy-small posture; acceptable only as integration fixture scale.
Hypothesis is performance-target (Sharpe≥1) without standalone structural mechanism beyond feeder aggregation.
findings.recommended_action: Treat as benchmark harness until feeder alignment fixed.

findings.finding: Same horizon mismatch as pofi_xsect_v1; decay_weighting_enabled cannot compensate for missing feeder signals in ctx.
Two of three feeders operate at horizon_seconds=30 (inventory, hawkes); cannot appear in 300s CrossSectionalContext under current synchronizer.
findings.recommended_action: Same remediation as other PORTFOLIO specs.

cross_alpha_findings.finding: PORTFOLIO reference alphas declare depends_on_signals spanning 30s and 300s horizons; runtime composition pipeline is single-horizon per context.
cross_alpha_findings.recommended_action: Platform or YAML remediation required before trusting multi-feeder cross-sectional economics.

cross_alpha_findings.finding: platform.yaml alpha_specs lists only pofi_benign_midcap_v1; other shipped alphas require explicit operator wiring plus sensor_specs coverage.
cross_alpha_findings.recommended_action: Document minimal sensor_specs sets per alpha bundle.

cross_alpha_findings.finding: AGENTS.md documents acceptance drift: baseline alpha trend_mechanism vs tests expecting v0.2 parity.
cross_alpha_findings.evidence: AGENTS.md Known pre-existing acceptance test failures
cross_alpha_findings.recommended_action: Reconcile tests or baseline YAML policy.

test_coverage_findings.finding: Added tests/alpha/test_shipped_alpha_specs_load.py — discovers and loads all eight shipped specs under loose and strict trend_mechanism enforcement.
No automated test asserts CrossSectionalContext contains non-null signals for every depends_on_signals feeder across horizon mismatches (gap surfaced only by audit tracing).
test_coverage_findings.recommended_action: Add assertion that completeness implies multi-feeder presence when configured, or enforce loader-side horizon alignment.

recommended_actions.action: Fix PORTFOLIO vs feeder horizon contract (code or YAML) before trusting multi-mechanism portfolio specs.
Reconcile pofi_benign_midcap_v1 mechanism narrative with KYLE_INFO taxonomy or sensors.
Tighten portfolio risk_budget defaults for any non-fixture deployment path.
Align inventory falsification half-life band text with G16 table.
